name: Wenyuan Group Corp.
business: Wenyuan Group Corp. sells cultural and health products through its subsidiary Hangzhou Wenyuan Art and Culture Co., Ltd. (HWAC), primarily through offline sales channels. In 2025, it generated $24,627 in revenue from offline product sales to a related party.

exposures.sentence: Starting from the first quarter of 2024, the Company initiated the sale of cultural and health products through its subsidiary, Hangzhou Wenyuan Art and Culture Co., Ltd. ( HWAC ).
We may become subject to a variety of laws and regulations in the PRC regarding privacy, data security, cybersecurity, and data protection.
